leadText: Shadow Fire (Japanese: ダークファイア Dark Fire) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Shadow Pokémon is purified. It is the signature move of Shadow Moltres.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Fire is a Shadow version of Flamethrower . It deals damage and has a 10% chance of burning the target. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Fire cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy fireball attack that may inflict a burn.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Fire is the only Shadow move that can cause burning .
